title: paeonia × smoutii
intro: Paeonia × smoutii, also known as the hybrid peony, is a cross between Paeonia officinalis and Paeonia tenuifolia, resulting in a unique and versatile plant with remarkable medicinal properties. The roots of Paeonia × smoutii have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which make them effective in relieving pain, reducing swelling, and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Paeonia × smoutii include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Paeonia × smoutii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
